text: Being here, I feel a mix of curiosity and reflection. The first space, with its glass-walled modernity and empty stage, feels anticipatory, as if something significant is about to unfold. The second image immerses me in the celebration of innovation and research; the vibrant colors and interactive displays ignite a sense of wonder about human progress. I feel like an explorer at the threshold of discovery, keenly aware of the constructed nature of such environments and the invitation they extend to interact with new ideas.
